_description: Shopware seo-url patterns from real recovery: multiple entries, slug mismatches, channel conflicts, deleted states

entries._case: Working redirect: deleted entry PATCHed to redirect to active category
Failed redirect: API 500 because another entry already points to same foreignKey

live_result.error: seo-url entry exists but Shopware does not resolve it

entries.api_error: HTTP 500 on initial PATCH - undocumented unique constraint on foreignKey per channel

entries._case: Wrong slug: PATCH succeeded but URL still 404 because slug doesnt match request path

live_result.note: User requests /Welche-product-item-bei-R./ but seo-url slug is product-itemn1/Welche-.../ - different prefix, no match

entries._case: Channel conflict: entry exists in headless API channel, not live storefront

live_result.note: Entry is in headless channel, live storefront cannot see it

entries._case: Deactivated category: seo-url isDeleted true, category active false
